# Assignable

**Protocol**

Documents conforming to this protocol can be assigned to a user.

## Declaration

```swift
protocol Assignable
```

## Assigning a document

- **assign(to:)**: Assign this document to a user.
- **assign(to:)**: Assign this document to a user.

## Instance Methods

- **makeAssignedWorkDocument()**: Create a new instance of an [doc://com.apple.Assignables/documentation/Assignables/AssignedWorkDocument].
- **makeAssignedWorkDocument(id:)**: Create a new instance of an [doc://com.apple.Assignables/documentation/Assignables/AssignedWorkDocument].

## Assignable document

- **AssignableDocument**: An assignable document is an augmented PDF that allows teachers to mark up the PDF with the intention of students taking the assessment.
- **AssignedWorkDocument**: An assigned work document is a document that contains taker and scorer markup specific to a taker. It also contains a copy of the assignable document upon which it is based.

## Conforming Types

- AssignableDocument
